recommendations.title: Batman: Under the Red Hood
recommendations.overview: One part vigilante, one part criminal kingpin, Red Hood begins cleaning up Gotham with the efficiency of Batman, but without following the same ethical code.

recommendations.title: Watchmen: Chapter I
recommendations.overview: In 1985, the murder of a government-sponsored superhero draws his outlawed colleagues out of retirement and into a mystery that threatens to upend their personal lives and the world itself.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Pirates Ahoy!
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Comedy, Family, Mystery, Adventure
recommendations.overview: It's horror on the high seas when Scooby-Doo and the gang take a creepy cruise into one of the world's most mysterious places, the Bermuda Triangle! If Scooby, Shaggy and the gang can't solve this mystery, they may have to walk the plank.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Reluctant Werewolf
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Mystery, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Shaggy is turned into a werewolf, and it's up to Scooby, Scrappy and Shaggy's girlfriend to help him win a race against other monsters, and become human again.

recommendations.title: Watchmen: Chapter II
recommendations.overview: Suspicious of the events ensnaring their former colleagues, Nite Owl and Silk Spectre are spurred out of retirement to investigate. As they grapple with personal ethics, inner demons and a society turned against them, they race the clock to uncover a

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Curse of the 13th Ghost

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Adventures: The Mystery Map
recommendations.overview: When Shaggy and Scooby find a mysterious pirate's treasure map in their triple-extra-large Scooby snack pizza, the whole Mystery Inc. gang sets out from their treehouse to find the lost booty of Gnarlybeard and the Phantom Parrot, encountering some s

recommendations.title: Scoob!
recommendations.overview: In Scooby-Doo’s greatest adventure yet, see the never-before told story of how lifelong friends Scooby and Shaggy first met and how they joined forces with young detectives Fred, Velma, and Daphne to form the famous Mystery Inc. Now, with hundreds of

recommendations.title: WWE Day 1 2022
recommendations.overview: WWE kicks off 2022 with the first-ever WWE Day 1 event. Big E puts the WWE Championship on the line against Brock Lesnar, Seth Rollins, Kevin Owens and Bobby Lashley in a Fatal 5-Way Match. "The Man" Becky Lynch defends the WWE Raw Women's Championsh

recommendations.title: DC Showcase - Batman: Death in the Family
recommendations.overview: Tragedy strikes the Batman's life again when Robin Jason Todd tracks down his birth mother only to run afoul of the Joker. An adaptation of the 1988 comic book storyline of the same name.
